summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Agents/Managers with assigned_categories/products can now see loans with empty/null category and product fields. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified login and dashboard for Admin, Manager, and Agent roles.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: Manager login successful
Backend: Agent login successful
Backend: P0 BUG FIX - Agent sees loans with empty category
Backend: P0 BUG FIX - Agent sees loans with empty product
Backend: P0 BUG FIX - Agent sees loans with both empty category AND product
Backend: Agent sees loans with assigned category and product
Backend: Agent /api/analytics/overview works
Backend: Agent /api/analytics/team-leaderboard works
Backend: Agent /api/analytics/unique-values works
Backend: Admin sees all loans regardless of category/product
Backend: Admin /api/analytics/overview works
Backend: Agent can create loan
UI: Login page loads correctly
UI: Agent login works - redirects to /monthly-mis
UI: Agent MIS Board shows loans with empty CATEGORY and PRODUCT columns (P0 fix verified)
UI: Admin login works - shows full dashboard with 8 total loans
UI: Admin dashboard shows Bank-wise Analysis, Team Performance Leaderboard
UI: Admin has full navigation menu (Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics, Schemes, Master File, Users, Statuses, Field Config, DB Backup, Settings)
UI: Manager login works - shows filtered dashboard with 2 loans
UI: Manager has limited navigation menu (Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics)

test_credentials.agent: agent@mhpfintech.com / Admin@123 (assigned_banks: SBI, HDFC Bank; assigned_categories: SECURED, UNSECURED; assigned_products: Home Loan, LAP)

p0_bug_fix_verification.issue: Agents/Managers with assigned_categories/products couldn't see loans where category/product was empty or null
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added + ['', None] to all $in queries for category/product filtering across all endpoints
p0_bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - All tests pass, agent can see loans with empty category/product

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 RBAC data visibility bug fix verified. The fix adds + ['', None] to all $in queries for category/product filtering. Agent with assigned_categories=['SECURED','UNSECURED'] and assigned_products=['Home Loan','LAP'] can now see loans with empty/null category and product fields. All analytics endpoints work correctly for all roles. No mocked APIs.
